title: festuca fragilis
intro: Festuca fragilis, also known as fragile fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Festuca fragilis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
